```{r fade-pos-setup, eval=has_fade_pos}
# Helper: draw 2-set Venn diagram using base ggplot2 (no extra packages).
# Circle labels are placed outside and above each circle to avoid overlapping
# with the count annotations inside.
.draw_venn2 <- function(n_only_A, n_only_B, n_AB, n_universe,
                         label_A, label_B, title_str) {
  theta <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 300)
  r <- 1.7; dx <- 1.05
  ciA <- data.frame(x = -dx + r * cos(theta), y = r * sin(theta))
  ciB <- data.frame(x =  dx + r * cos(theta), y = r * sin(theta))
  ggplot() +
    geom_polygon(data = ciA, aes(x, y), fill = .tableau10[1], alpha = 0.22, colour = NA) +
    geom_polygon(data = ciB, aes(x, y), fill = .tableau10[3], alpha = 0.22, colour = NA) +
    geom_path(data = ciA, aes(x, y), colour = .tableau10[1], linewidth = 1.4) +
    geom_path(data = ciB, aes(x, y), colour = .tableau10[3], linewidth = 1.4) +
    annotate("text", x = -2.6, y = 0,
             label = paste0(label_A, " only\n", scales::comma(n_only_A)),
             size = 4.2, colour = .tableau10[1], fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0,
             label = paste0("Both\n", scales::comma(n_AB)),
             size = 4.2, colour = "grey20", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = 2.6, y = 0,
             label = paste0(label_B, " only\n", scales::comma(n_only_B)),
             size = 4.2, colour = .tableau10[3], fontface = "bold") +
    # Circle titles: pushed to x = -3.5 and +3.5 (outside the overlap zone)
    annotate("text", x = -3.5, y = 2.8, label = label_A, size = 4.5,
             colour = .tableau10[1], fontface = "bold", hjust = 0.5) +
    annotate("text", x =  3.5, y = 2.8, label = label_B, size = 4.5,
             colour = .tableau10[3], fontface = "bold", hjust = 0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = -2.6,
             label = sprintf("Universe: %s positions", scales::comma(n_universe)),
             size = 3.5, colour = "grey50") +
    coord_fixed(xlim = c(-5.5, 5.5), ylim = c(-3.2, 3.5)) +
    labs(title = title_str) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 12))
}

# Helper: compute Venn counts (CAAS dir positions vs full FADE sig set)
.fade_venn_counts <- function(pos_dir, fade_df) {
  if (is.null(pos_dir) || is.null(fade_df)) return(NULL)
  caas_keys     <- pos_dir  %>% select(Gene, Position) %>% distinct()
  fade_sig_keys <- fade_df  %>%
    filter(!is.na(max_site_bf), max_site_bf >= 100) %>%
    select(Gene, Position) %>% distinct()
  n_A   <- nrow(caas_keys)
  n_B   <- nrow(fade_sig_keys)
  n_AB  <- nrow(inner_join(caas_keys, fade_sig_keys, by = c("Gene", "Position")))
  list(n_only_A = n_A - n_AB, n_only_B = n_B - n_AB, n_AB = n_AB,
       n_A = n_A, n_B = n_B, n_universe = n_A + max(n_B - n_AB, 0))
}

vc_top <- .fade_venn_counts(pos_top,    fade_top_df)
vc_bot <- .fade_venn_counts(pos_bottom, fade_bot_df)
```

### Venn Diagrams

```{r fade-venn-plots, eval=has_fade_any, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
venn_plots <- list()
if (!is.null(vc_top)) {
  venn_plots[["top"]] <- .draw_venn2(
    vc_top$n_only_A, vc_top$n_only_B, vc_top$n_AB, vc_top$n_universe,
    "CAAS (top)", "FADE BF\u2265100 (top)",
    "TOP direction: CAAS vs FADE-significant positions"
  )
}
if (!is.null(vc_bot)) {
  venn_plots[["bot"]] <- .draw_venn2(
    vc_bot$n_only_A, vc_bot$n_only_B, vc_bot$n_AB, vc_bot$n_universe,
    "CAAS (bottom)", "FADE BF\u2265100 (bottom)",
    "BOTTOM direction: CAAS vs FADE-significant positions"
  )
}
if (length(venn_plots) == 2) {
  gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = venn_plots, ncol = 2)
} else if (length(venn_plots) == 1) {
  print(venn_plots[[1]])
}
```

```{r fade-venn-overlap-table, eval=has_fade_any}
# Table of positions in the intersection (CAAS + FADE BF>=100), by direction
.venn_overlap_positions <- function(pos_dir, fade_df, dir_label) {
  if (is.null(pos_dir) || is.null(fade_df)) return(NULL)
  caas_sel <- if ("caas" %in% names(pos_dir))
    c("Gene", "Position", "CAAS_score", "caas", "change_side") else
    c("Gene", "Position", "CAAS_score", "change_side")
  inner_join(
    pos_dir  %>% select(any_of(caas_sel)),
    fade_df  %>% filter(!is.na(max_site_bf), max_site_bf >= 100) %>%
                 select(Gene, Position, max_site_bf, top_target_aa),
    by = c("Gene", "Position")
  ) %>%
    mutate(Direction = dir_label) %>%
    arrange(desc(max_site_bf))
}

overlap_pos_tbl <- bind_rows(
  .venn_overlap_positions(pos_top,    fade_top_df, "TOP"),
  .venn_overlap_positions(pos_bottom, fade_bot_df, "BOTTOM")
)

if (nrow(overlap_pos_tbl) > 0) {
  DT::datatable(
    overlap_pos_tbl %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4))),
    filter   = "top",
    rownames = FALSE,
    options  = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
    caption  = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
      "Positions in the CAAS \u2229 FADE (BF \u2265 100) intersection, by direction"
    )
  )
} else {
  cat("> No positions found in the CAAS \u2229 FADE intersection.")
}
```

### Overlap Table

```{r fade-overlap-table, eval=has_fade_any}
.fade_overlap_row <- function(pos_fade_dir, dir_label, pct_val, pct_label) {
  if (is.null(pos_fade_dir)) return(NULL)
  thr  <- quantile(pos_fade_dir$CAAS_score, 1 - pct_val, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_caas <- sum(pos_fade_dir$CAAS_score >= thr, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_sig  <- sum(pos_fade_dir$fade_sig, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_both <- sum(pos_fade_dir$CAAS_score >= thr & pos_fade_dir$fade_sig, na.rm = TRUE)
  tibble(
    Direction           = dir_label,
    `CAAS threshold`    = pct_label,
    `N CAAS positions`  = n_caas,
    `N FADE BF >= 100`  = n_sig,
    `Overlap`           = n_both,
    `% CAAS in FADE`    = sprintf("%.1f%%", 100 * n_both / max(n_caas, 1)),
    `% FADE in CAAS`    = sprintf("%.1f%%", 100 * n_both / max(n_sig,  1))
  )
}

pct_list <- list(
  list(val = params$top_pct,  lbl = sprintf("Top %g%%", params$top_pct  * 100)),
  list(val = params$top5_pct, lbl = sprintf("Top %g%%", params$top5_pct * 100)),
  list(val = params$top1_pct, lbl = sprintf("Top %g%%", params$top1_pct * 100))
)

fade_overlap_tbl <- bind_rows(
  purrr::map_dfr(pct_list, ~.fade_overlap_row(pos_fade_top, "TOP",    .x$val, .x$lbl)),
  purrr::map_dfr(pct_list, ~.fade_overlap_row(pos_fade_bot, "BOTTOM", .x$val, .x$lbl))
)

knitr::kable(
  fade_overlap_tbl,
  caption = "Overlap between top-CAAS positions and FADE-significant positions (BF \u2265 100), by direction and CAAS threshold"
)
```

### CAAS vs FADE Correlation

```{r fade-caas-corr, eval=has_fade_any, fig.height=5}
# Combine top and bottom joined datasets; plot CAAS_score vs log10(BF)
# with rank-normalised axes so Pearson r is not dominated by BF outliers.
.fade_corr_df <- bind_rows(
  if (!is.null(pos_fade_top)) pos_fade_top %>% mutate(fade_direction = "TOP")    else NULL,
  if (!is.null(pos_fade_bot)) pos_fade_bot %>% mutate(fade_direction = "BOTTOM") else NULL
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_site_bf)) %>%
  mutate(log10_bf = log10(pmax(max_site_bf, 0.01)))

.corr_label <- .fade_corr_df %>%
  group_by(fade_direction) %>%
  summarise(
    r_pearson  = cor(norm_caas, norm_log_bf, use = "complete.obs"),
    r_spearman = cor(CAAS_score, log10_bf, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = sprintf("%s: r=%.3f (rank-norm Pearson) / \u03c1=%.3f (Spearman)",
                         fade_direction, r_pearson, r_spearman))

ggplot(.fade_corr_df, aes(x = CAAS_score, y = log10_bf, colour = fade_direction)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 0.9) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.12) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("TOP" = .tableau10[1], "BOTTOM" = .tableau10[3]),
                      name = "Direction") +
  annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = 2.05, hjust = -0.05, vjust = 0,
           label = "BF = 100", size = 3, colour = "grey40") +
  labs(
    title    = "CAAS Score vs FADE max Bayes Factor",
    subtitle = paste(.corr_label$label, collapse = "\n"),
    x = "CAAS Score", y = "log10(max site BF)"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, colour = "grey30"))
```

---

## Gene-Level Characterisation {.tabset}

Directional gene sets (TOP and BOTTOM) are characterised against independent
evolutionary signals. All correlations use rank-normalised variables.

### Gene CAAS Score

```{r gene-caas-dir-dist, fig.height=5}
# Directional thresholds
g_top_thr_10 <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_top, 1 - params$gene_top_pct,  na.rm = TRUE)
g_top_thr_5  <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_top, 1 - params$gene_top5_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
g_top_thr_1  <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_top, 1 - params$gene_top1_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
g_bot_thr_10 <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_bot, 1 - params$gene_top_pct,  na.rm = TRUE)
g_bot_thr_5  <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_bot, 1 - params$gene_top5_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
g_bot_thr_1  <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_bot, 1 - params$gene_top1_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
g_thr_10 <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_score, 1 - params$gene_top_pct, na.rm = TRUE)

long_dir_scores <- bind_rows(
  gene_df %>% filter(!is.na(gene_caas_top)) %>%
    transmute(Gene, score = gene_caas_top, direction = "TOP"),
  gene_df %>% filter(!is.na(gene_caas_bot)) %>%
    transmute(Gene, score = gene_caas_bot, direction = "BOTTOM")
)

ggplot(long_dir_scores, aes(x = score, fill = direction, colour = direction)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.45, linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = g_top_thr_10, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = .tableau10[1], linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = g_bot_thr_10, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = .tableau10[2], linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = c("TOP" = .tableau10[1], "BOTTOM" = .tableau10[2])) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("TOP" = .tableau10[1], "BOTTOM" = .tableau10[2])) +
  labs(title = "Directional Gene CAAS Score Distribution",
       subtitle = sprintf("90th pctile of directional positions | dashed = top %g%% threshold per direction",
                          params$gene_top_pct * 100),
       x = "Gene CAAS Score", y = "Density") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

### RERConverge

`r if (!has_rer) "> **Note:** RERConverge results not available for this run."`

```{r gene-rer-venn, eval=has_rer, fig.height=5, fig.width=12}
rer_accel_sig <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(rer_min_pval), rer_min_pval <= 0.05,
         !is.na(rer_rho), rer_rho > 0) %>% pull(Gene)
rer_decel_sig <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(rer_min_pval), rer_min_pval <= 0.05,
         !is.na(rer_rho), rer_rho < 0) %>% pull(Gene)

vc_rer_top <- .venn_counts(gene_top_list, rer_accel_sig, "CAAS TOP", "RER Accel.")
vc_rer_bot <- .venn_counts(gene_bot_list, rer_decel_sig, "CAAS BOT", "RER Decel.")
gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  .draw_venn(vc_rer_top, .tableau10[1], .tableau10[3], "TOP genes vs RER Accelerating"),
  .draw_venn(vc_rer_bot, .tableau10[2], .tableau10[4], "BOTTOM genes vs RER Decelerating"),
  ncol = 2,
  top = grid::textGrob("RERConverge Gene Overlap (CAAS top 10% vs RER p \u2264 0.05)",
                        gp = grid::gpar(fontface="bold", fontsize=13)))
```

```{r gene-rer-table, eval=has_rer}
rer_tbl <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(rer_min_pval)) %>%
  mutate(
    rer_direction = case_when(rer_rho > 0 ~ "accelerating",
                               rer_rho < 0 ~ "decelerating",
                               TRUE        ~ "neutral"),
    in_top_list = Gene %in% gene_top_list,
    in_bot_list = Gene %in% gene_bot_list
  ) %>%
  arrange(rer_min_pval) %>%
  select(Gene, rer_min_pval, rer_rho, rer_direction,
         gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top, gene_caas_bot,
         in_top_list, in_bot_list) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4)))

DT::datatable(
  rer_tbl, filter="top", rownames=FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength=20, scrollX=TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    "RERConverge results ranked by p-value — direction (rho sign) and CAAS gene list membership"
  )
)
```

```{r gene-rer-correlation, eval=has_rer, fig.height=5}
rer_cor_df <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(rer_min_pval), !is.na(gene_caas_score)) %>%
  mutate(
    x_norm  = rank_norm(gene_caas_score),
    y_norm  = rank_norm(-log10(pmax(rer_min_pval, 1e-300))),
    rer_dir = case_when(rer_rho > 0 ~ "accelerating",
                         rer_rho < 0 ~ "decelerating", TRUE ~ "neutral")
  )
ggplot(rer_cor_df, aes(x=x_norm, y=y_norm, colour=rer_dir)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.5, size=1.2) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, colour="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = rer_cor_df %>%
      filter(y_norm > quantile(y_norm, 0.95, na.rm=TRUE) |
             x_norm > quantile(x_norm, 0.95, na.rm=TRUE)),
    aes(label=Gene), size=2.5, max.overlaps=12, show.legend=FALSE
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("accelerating"=.tableau10[1], "decelerating"=.tableau10[2], "neutral"="grey60"),
    name = "RER direction") +
  labs(title = "Gene CAAS Score vs RERConverge Signal (rank-normalised)",
       subtitle = sprintf("r = %.3f | x = rank_norm(gene_caas_score), y = rank_norm(-log10(p.perm))",
                          safe_cor(rer_cor_df$x_norm, rer_cor_df$y_norm)),
       x = "Gene CAAS Score (rank-norm)", y = "RER Signal (rank-norm)") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold"))
```

### FADE Gene

`r if (!has_fade_pos) "> **Note:** FADE site data not available — gene-level FADE analysis skipped."`

```{r gene-fade-setup, eval=has_fade_pos}
if (!is.null(fade_top_df) && nrow(fade_top_df) > 0) {
  gene_fade_top_agg <- fade_top_df %>%
    group_by(Gene) %>%
    summarise(fade_top_sig    = any(max_site_bf >= 100, na.rm=TRUE),
              fade_top_max_bf = max(max_site_bf, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
} else {
  gene_fade_top_agg <- tibble(Gene=character(), fade_top_sig=logical(), fade_top_max_bf=numeric())
}
if (!is.null(fade_bot_df) && nrow(fade_bot_df) > 0) {
  gene_fade_bot_agg <- fade_bot_df %>%
    group_by(Gene) %>%
    summarise(fade_bot_sig    = any(max_site_bf >= 100, na.rm=TRUE),
              fade_bot_max_bf = max(max_site_bf, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
} else {
  gene_fade_bot_agg <- tibble(Gene=character(), fade_bot_sig=logical(), fade_bot_max_bf=numeric())
}
gene_fade_df <- gene_df %>%
  select(Gene, gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top, gene_caas_bot, n_positions) %>%
  left_join(gene_fade_top_agg, by="Gene") %>%
  left_join(gene_fade_bot_agg, by="Gene") %>%
  mutate(fade_top_sig = replace_na(fade_top_sig, FALSE),
         fade_bot_sig = replace_na(fade_bot_sig, FALSE))
has_gene_fade_any <- any(gene_fade_df$fade_top_sig) || any(gene_fade_df$fade_bot_sig)
```

```{r gene-fade-venn, eval=has_fade_pos && exists("has_gene_fade_any") && has_gene_fade_any, fig.height=5, fig.width=12}
fade_top_genes <- gene_fade_df %>% filter(fade_top_sig) %>% pull(Gene)
fade_bot_genes <- gene_fade_df %>% filter(fade_bot_sig) %>% pull(Gene)
vc_fade_top <- .venn_counts(gene_top_list, fade_top_genes, "CAAS TOP", "FADE TOP sig")
vc_fade_bot <- .venn_counts(gene_bot_list, fade_bot_genes, "CAAS BOT", "FADE BOT sig")
gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  .draw_venn(vc_fade_top, .tableau10[1], .tableau10[5], "TOP genes vs FADE TOP (BF\u2265100)"),
  .draw_venn(vc_fade_bot, .tableau10[2], .tableau10[6], "BOTTOM genes vs FADE BOT (BF\u2265100)"),
  ncol = 2,
  top = grid::textGrob("FADE Gene Overlap (CAAS top 10% vs FADE BF \u2265 100)",
                        gp = grid::gpar(fontface="bold", fontsize=13)))
```

```{r gene-fade-correlation, eval=has_fade_pos && exists("has_gene_fade_any") && has_gene_fade_any, fig.height=5, fig.width=12}
fade_cor_top <- gene_fade_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_caas_top), !is.na(fade_top_max_bf), is.finite(fade_top_max_bf)) %>%
  mutate(x_norm=rank_norm(gene_caas_top), y_norm=rank_norm(fade_top_max_bf))
fade_cor_bot <- gene_fade_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_caas_bot), !is.na(fade_bot_max_bf), is.finite(fade_bot_max_bf)) %>%
  mutate(x_norm=rank_norm(gene_caas_bot), y_norm=rank_norm(fade_bot_max_bf))

.fade_scatter <- function(df, col, title, xlab, ylab) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x=x_norm, y=y_norm)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5, size=1.2, colour=col) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, colour="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = df %>% filter(y_norm > quantile(y_norm, 0.95, na.rm=TRUE)),
      aes(label=Gene), size=2.5, max.overlaps=10, show.legend=FALSE
    ) +
    labs(title=title,
         subtitle=sprintf("r = %.3f", safe_cor(df$x_norm, df$y_norm)),
         x=xlab, y=ylab) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold", size=11))
}
gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  .fade_scatter(fade_cor_top, .tableau10[1],
                "TOP: CAAS vs FADE BF (rank-norm)",
                "gene_caas_top (rank-norm)", "FADE top max BF (rank-norm)"),
  .fade_scatter(fade_cor_bot, .tableau10[2],
                "BOTTOM: CAAS vs FADE BF (rank-norm)",
                "gene_caas_bot (rank-norm)", "FADE bot max BF (rank-norm)"),
  ncol=2,
  top=grid::textGrob("Gene CAAS Score vs FADE BF — rank-normalised",
                      gp=grid::gpar(fontface="bold", fontsize=13)))
```

```{r gene-fade-table, eval=has_fade_pos}
fade_tbl <- gene_fade_df %>%
  mutate(
    in_top_list = Gene %in% gene_top_list,
    in_bot_list = Gene %in% gene_bot_list
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pmax(replace_na(fade_top_max_bf, 0), replace_na(fade_bot_max_bf, 0)))) %>%
  select(Gene,
         fade_top_max_bf, fade_top_sig,
         fade_bot_max_bf, fade_bot_sig,
         gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top, gene_caas_bot,
         in_top_list, in_bot_list) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4)))

DT::datatable(
  fade_tbl, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    "FADE gene-level results ranked by max BF — direction and CAAS gene list membership"
  )
)
```

### Accumulation

`r if (!has_accum_score) "> **Note:** Accumulation scores not available for this run."`

```{r gene-accum-venn, eval=has_accum_score, fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
pct_list_gene <- list(
  list(val=params$gene_top_pct,  lbl=sprintf("Top %g%%", params$gene_top_pct  * 100)),
  list(val=params$gene_top5_pct, lbl=sprintf("Top %g%%", params$gene_top5_pct * 100)),
  list(val=params$gene_top1_pct, lbl=sprintf("Top %g%%", params$gene_top1_pct * 100))
)
accum_venn_plots <- list()
accum_overlap_exports <- list()  # collect overlap gene lists for ORA export
for (dir_lbl in c("TOP", "BOTTOM")) {
  caas_col <- if (dir_lbl == "TOP") "gene_caas_top" else "gene_caas_bot"
  col_a    <- if (dir_lbl == "TOP") .tableau10[1]   else .tableau10[2]
  dir_slug <- tolower(dir_lbl)
  for (pct in pct_list_gene) {
    caas_genes  <- gene_df %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[caas_col]])) %>%
      slice_max(.data[[caas_col]], prop=pct$val) %>% pull(Gene)
    accum_genes <- gene_df %>% filter(!is.na(gene_accum_score)) %>%
      slice_max(gene_accum_score, prop=pct$val) %>% pull(Gene)
    overlap_genes <- intersect(caas_genes, accum_genes)
    pct_slug <- gsub("[^0-9]", "", pct$lbl)  # e.g. "10", "5", "1"
    accum_overlap_exports[[sprintf("gene_caas_%s_top%spct_x_accum.txt", dir_slug, pct_slug)]] <- overlap_genes
    vc <- .venn_counts(caas_genes, accum_genes, sprintf("CAAS %s", dir_lbl), "Accum.")
    accum_venn_plots[[length(accum_venn_plots)+1]] <-
      .draw_venn(vc, col_a, .tableau10[5], sprintf("%s — %s", dir_lbl, pct$lbl))
  }
}

# Export accumulation overlap gene lists as .txt files for downstream ORA
for (fname in names(accum_overlap_exports)) {
  genes <- unique(accum_overlap_exports[[fname]])
  genes <- genes[!is.na(genes) & genes != ""]
  if (length(genes) > 0) {
    writeLines(genes, file.path(params$output_dir, fname))
    cat(sprintf("  Exported %s: %d genes\n", fname, length(genes)))
  }
}

gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs=accum_venn_plots, ncol=3,
  top=grid::textGrob("Directional CAAS Gene List vs Top Accumulation Genes",
                      gp=grid::gpar(fontface="bold", fontsize=13)))
```

```{r gene-accum-correlation, eval=has_accum_score, fig.height=5, fig.width=12}
accum_cor_top <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_caas_top), !is.na(gene_accum_score)) %>%
  mutate(x_norm=rank_norm(gene_caas_top), y_norm=rank_norm(gene_accum_score))
accum_cor_bot <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_caas_bot), !is.na(gene_accum_score)) %>%
  mutate(x_norm=rank_norm(gene_caas_bot), y_norm=rank_norm(gene_accum_score))

gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  ggplot(accum_cor_top, aes(x=x_norm, y=y_norm)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5, size=1.2, colour=.tableau10[1]) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, colour="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data=accum_cor_top %>% filter(x_norm>quantile(x_norm,0.95,na.rm=TRUE)|
                                      y_norm>quantile(y_norm,0.95,na.rm=TRUE)),
      aes(label=Gene), size=2.5, max.overlaps=10, show.legend=FALSE) +
    labs(title="TOP: gene_caas_top vs Accumulation",
         subtitle=sprintf("r = %.3f | rank-normalised",
                          safe_cor(accum_cor_top$x_norm, accum_cor_top$y_norm)),
         x="gene_caas_top (rank-norm)", y="gene_accum_score (rank-norm)") +
    theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold", size=11)),
  ggplot(accum_cor_bot, aes(x=x_norm, y=y_norm)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5, size=1.2, colour=.tableau10[2]) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, colour="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data=accum_cor_bot %>% filter(x_norm>quantile(x_norm,0.95,na.rm=TRUE)|
                                      y_norm>quantile(y_norm,0.95,na.rm=TRUE)),
      aes(label=Gene), size=2.5, max.overlaps=10, show.legend=FALSE) +
    labs(title="BOTTOM: gene_caas_bot vs Accumulation",
         subtitle=sprintf("r = %.3f | rank-normalised",
                          safe_cor(accum_cor_bot$x_norm, accum_cor_bot$y_norm)),
         x="gene_caas_bot (rank-norm)", y="gene_accum_score (rank-norm)") +
    theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold", size=11)),
  ncol=2,
  top=grid::textGrob("Gene CAAS vs Accumulation — rank-normalised",
                      gp=grid::gpar(fontface="bold", fontsize=13)))
```

```{r gene-accum-table, eval=has_accum_score}
accum_pval_cols <- grep("^accum_pval_", names(gene_df), value = TRUE)
accum_tbl <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_accum_score)) %>%
  mutate(
    in_top_list = Gene %in% gene_top_list,
    in_bot_list = Gene %in% gene_bot_list
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(gene_accum_score)) %>%
  select(Gene, gene_accum_score, any_of(accum_pval_cols),
         gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top, gene_caas_bot,
         in_top_list, in_bot_list) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4)))

DT::datatable(
  accum_tbl, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    "Accumulation gene scores ranked by gene_accum_score — per-scheme p-values and CAAS membership"
  )
)
```

### PrimateAI-3D

`r if (!has_vep_primateai) "> **Note:** PrimateAI-3D scores are not available for this run."`

> **Note:** PrimateAI-3D scores require an access request to Illumina —
> see illumina.com/science/genomics-research/articles/primateai-3d.html

```{r gene-pai-directional, eval=has_vep_primateai, fig.height=5, fig.width=12}
gene_vep_pai <- pos_vep_pai %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  summarise(n_pai_positions = n(),
            mean_pai_char   = mean(pai_char_score, na.rm=TRUE),
            sum_pai_char    = sum(pai_char_score,  na.rm=TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  inner_join(gene_df %>% select(Gene, gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top,
                                gene_caas_bot, n_positions, gene_direction),
             by = "Gene")

pai_top_df <- gene_vep_pai %>%
  filter(gene_direction %in% c("top","both"), !is.na(gene_caas_top)) %>%
  mutate(x_norm=rank_norm(gene_caas_top), y_norm=rank_norm(mean_pai_char))
pai_bot_df <- gene_vep_pai %>%
  filter(gene_direction %in% c("bottom","both"), !is.na(gene_caas_bot)) %>%
  mutate(x_norm=rank_norm(gene_caas_bot), y_norm=rank_norm(mean_pai_char))

gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  ggplot(pai_top_df, aes(x=x_norm, y=y_norm, size=n_positions)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.65, colour=.tableau10[1]) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, colour="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data=pai_top_df %>% slice_max(y_norm, n=15, with_ties=FALSE),
      aes(label=Gene), size=2.5, max.overlaps=15, show.legend=FALSE) +
    scale_size_continuous(name="N pos", range=c(1,6)) +
    labs(title="TOP genes: CAAS vs PrimateAI-3D",
         subtitle=sprintf("r = %.3f | rank-normalised",
                          safe_cor(pai_top_df$x_norm, pai_top_df$y_norm)),
         x="gene_caas_top (rank-norm)", y="Mean PAI3D char score (rank-norm)") +
    theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold", size=11)),
  ggplot(pai_bot_df, aes(x=x_norm, y=y_norm, size=n_positions)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.65, colour=.tableau10[2]) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, colour="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data=pai_bot_df %>% slice_max(y_norm, n=15, with_ties=FALSE),
      aes(label=Gene), size=2.5, max.overlaps=15, show.legend=FALSE) +
    scale_size_continuous(name="N pos", range=c(1,6)) +
    labs(title="BOTTOM genes: CAAS vs PrimateAI-3D",
         subtitle=sprintf("r = %.3f | rank-normalised",
                          safe_cor(pai_bot_df$x_norm, pai_bot_df$y_norm)),
         x="gene_caas_bot (rank-norm)", y="Mean PAI3D char score (rank-norm)") +
    theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold", size=11)),
  ncol=2,
  top=grid::textGrob("Gene CAAS vs PrimateAI-3D — Direction-aware (rank-normalised)",
                      gp=grid::gpar(fontface="bold", fontsize=13)))
```

```{r gene-pai-top-bar, eval=has_vep_primateai, fig.height=6}
top_pai_genes <- gene_vep_pai %>%
  filter(n_pai_positions >= 2, mean_pai_char > 0) %>%
  slice_max(mean_pai_char, n=30, with_ties=FALSE) %>%
  arrange(mean_pai_char) %>%
  mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels=Gene))

ggplot(top_pai_genes, aes(x=mean_pai_char, y=Gene, fill=gene_caas_score)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name="Gene\nCAAS score", option="plasma") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(title = "Top 30 Genes by Mean PrimateAI-3D Characterisation Score",
       subtitle = paste0("Genes with \u2265 2 positions with PAI3D coverage | colour = gene_caas_score"),
       x = "Mean pai_char_score", y = NULL) +
  theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold"), axis.text.y=element_text(size=8))
```

```{r gene-pai-table, eval=has_vep_primateai}
pai_tbl <- gene_vep_pai %>%
  mutate(
    in_top_list = Gene %in% gene_top_list,
    in_bot_list = Gene %in% gene_bot_list
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_pai_char)) %>%
  select(Gene, n_pai_positions, mean_pai_char, sum_pai_char,
         gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top, gene_caas_bot, gene_direction,
         in_top_list, in_bot_list) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4)))

DT::datatable(
  pai_tbl, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    "PrimateAI-3D gene scores ranked by mean PAI characterisation score"
  )
)
```

### Top Genes

```{r top-genes-table}
top_genes_df <- gene_df %>%
  arrange(desc(gene_caas_score))

# ── Direction assignment ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (has_rer) {
  top_genes_df <- top_genes_df %>%
    mutate(rer_direction = case_when(
      !is.na(rer_rho) & rer_rho > 0 ~ "accelerating",
      !is.na(rer_rho) & rer_rho < 0 ~ "decelerating",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))
}

# ── FADE: max BF and BF>=100 significance flag per direction ─────────────────
if (has_fade_pos && exists("gene_fade_df")) {
  top_genes_df <- top_genes_df %>%
    left_join(
      gene_fade_df %>% select(Gene, fade_top_max_bf, fade_bot_max_bf,
                               fade_top_sig, fade_bot_sig),
      by = "Gene"
    )
}

# ── Accumulation score ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# gene_accum_score already on top_genes_df; no extra join needed.

# ── PrimateAI-3D mean characterisation score per gene ────────────────────────
if (has_vep_primateai && exists("gene_vep_pai")) {
  top_genes_df <- top_genes_df %>%
    left_join(gene_vep_pai %>% select(Gene, mean_pai_char, n_pai_positions),
              by = "Gene")
}

# ── CAAS-threshold indicators (10%, 50% and 100%) per direction ──────────────
g_top_thr_50 <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_top, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)
g_bot_thr_50 <- quantile(gene_df$gene_caas_bot, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)

top_genes_df <- top_genes_df %>%
  mutate(
    in_top_10pct = replace_na(gene_caas_top >= g_top_thr_10, FALSE),
    in_top_50pct = replace_na(gene_caas_top >= g_top_thr_50, FALSE),
    in_bot_10pct = replace_na(gene_caas_bot >= g_bot_thr_10, FALSE),
    in_bot_50pct = replace_na(gene_caas_bot >= g_bot_thr_50, FALSE)
  )

# ── Build display column list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
gene_display_cols <- c("Gene", "n_positions",
                       "gene_caas_score", "gene_caas_top", "gene_caas_bot",
                       "in_top_10pct", "in_top_50pct",
                       "in_bot_10pct", "in_bot_50pct")
if (has_accum_score)
  gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "gene_accum_score")
if (has_rer)
  gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "rer_min_pval", "rer_direction")
if (has_fade_pos && "fade_top_max_bf" %in% names(top_genes_df))
  gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols,
                         "fade_top_max_bf", "fade_top_sig",
                         "fade_bot_max_bf", "fade_bot_sig")
if (has_vep_primateai && "mean_pai_char" %in% names(top_genes_df))
  gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "n_pai_positions", "mean_pai_char")

DT::datatable(
  top_genes_df %>%
    select(any_of(gene_display_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("n_positions|n_pai"), ~round(., 4))),
  filter = "top", rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    sprintf("Gene-level scores | Trait: %s | sorted by gene_caas_score", params$traitname)
  )
)
```

---

## Genomic Accumulation {.tabset}

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates (gene_ensembl_file) are not available for this run — genomic accumulation skipped."`

```{r genomic-setup, eval=has_genomic}
# Join gene_df with genomic coordinates, then annotate with VEP
gene_genomic <- gene_df %>%
  select(Gene, gene_caas_score, gene_caas_top, gene_caas_bot, n_positions) %>%
  inner_join(genomic_raw, by = "Gene") %>%
  # Standardise chromosome labels (remove "chr" prefix if present)
  mutate(
    chr_label = sub("^chr", "", chr),
    # Order chromosomes numerically then X, Y, MT
    chr_num   = suppressWarnings(as.integer(chr_label)),
    chr_order = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(chr_num)       ~ chr_num,
      chr_label == "X"      ~ 23L,
      chr_label == "Y"      ~ 24L,
      chr_label %in% c("MT","M") ~ 25L,
      TRUE                  ~ 26L
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(chr_order, gene_mid)

# Optionally add mean PAI characterisation score
if (has_vep_primateai && exists("gene_vep_pai")) {
  gene_genomic <- gene_genomic %>%
    left_join(gene_vep_pai %>% select(Gene, mean_pai_char),
              by = "Gene")
} else {
  gene_genomic$mean_pai_char <- NA_real_
}

# Build a cumulative x-axis offset per chromosome for a stitched Manhattan view
chr_offsets <- gene_genomic %>%
  group_by(chr_order, chr_label) %>%
  summarise(chr_max = max(gene_end, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(chr_order) %>%
  mutate(offset = cumsum(lag(chr_max, default = 0L)) + (chr_order - 1L) * 5e6L)

gene_genomic <- gene_genomic %>%
  left_join(chr_offsets %>% select(chr_order, offset, chr_label), by = c("chr_order", "chr_label")) %>%
  mutate(manhattan_x = gene_mid + offset)

chr_label_positions <- chr_offsets %>%
  left_join(gene_genomic %>% group_by(chr_order) %>%
              summarise(mid_x = mean(manhattan_x, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
            by = "chr_order")
```

```{r window-helper, eval=has_genomic}
# Helper: tile chromosomes into non-overlapping windows of win_size bp.
# Each gene/position is assigned to the window containing its genomic midpoint.
# Returns a dataframe with one row per window, summarising mean and max score.
make_window_accum <- function(df, score_col,
                               win_size = params$window_size_bp) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      win_id    = floor(gene_mid / win_size),
      win_start = win_id * win_size,
      win_end   = win_start + win_size - 1L,
      win_mid   = win_start + win_size / 2L
    ) %>%
    group_by(chr_order, chr_label, win_id, win_start, win_end, win_mid) %>%
    summarise(
      n_genes    = dplyr::n(),
      mean_score = mean(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      max_score  = max(.data[[score_col]],  na.rm = TRUE),
      genes      = paste(unique(Gene), collapse = ", "),
      .groups    = "drop"
    )
}

# Stitch window midpoints onto the cumulative chromosome x-axis (same offsets
# as gene_genomic so windows align with the per-gene manhattans above).
stitch_windows <- function(win_df) {
  win_df %>%
    left_join(chr_offsets %>% select(chr_order, offset), by = "chr_order") %>%
    mutate(win_x = win_mid + offset,
           chr_even = chr_order %% 2 == 0)
}
```

### CAAS Score Manhattan

```{r genomic-manhattan-caas, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
gene_genomic <- gene_genomic %>%
  mutate(
    chr_even      = chr_order %% 2 == 0,
    caas_log      = -log10(1 - pmin(gene_caas_score, 0.9999)),
    caas_top_log  = -log10(1 - pmin(replace_na(gene_caas_top, 0), 0.9999)),
    caas_bot_log  = -log10(1 - pmin(replace_na(gene_caas_bot, 0), 0.9999))
  )
caas_log_thr <- -log10(1 - pmin(g_thr_10, 0.9999))

ggplot(gene_genomic,
       aes(x = manhattan_x, y = caas_log,
           colour = chr_even, size = n_positions)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = caas_log_thr, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.6) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_genomic %>% slice_max(caas_log, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 15,
    show.legend = FALSE, colour = "black"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("FALSE"=.tableau10[1], "TRUE"=.tableau10[2]), guide="none") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N positions", range = c(0.5, 5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Gene CAAS Score — Manhattan View",
    subtitle = sprintf("%d genes | y = -log10(1 - gene_caas_score) | dashed = top %g%% threshold",
                       nrow(gene_genomic), params$gene_top_pct * 100),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "-log10(1 - gene_caas_score)"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold"), axis.text.x=element_text(size=7),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())
```

### PAI3D Signal Manhattan

`r if (!has_vep_primateai) "> **Note:** PrimateAI-3D scores not available — PAI3D Manhattan skipped."`

```{r genomic-manhattan-pai, eval=has_genomic && has_vep_primateai && exists("gene_vep_pai"), fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
gene_genomic_pai <- gene_genomic
if (!"mean_pai_char" %in% names(gene_genomic_pai)) {
  gene_genomic_pai <- gene_genomic_pai %>%
    left_join(gene_vep_pai %>% select(Gene, mean_pai_char), by = "Gene")
}

ggplot(gene_genomic_pai %>% filter(!is.na(mean_pai_char)),
       aes(x=manhattan_x, y=caas_log, size=mean_pai_char, colour=mean_pai_char)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.70) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=caas_log_thr, linetype="dashed",
             colour="grey60", linewidth=0.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_genomic_pai %>% filter(!is.na(mean_pai_char)) %>%
      slice_max(mean_pai_char, n=20, with_ties=FALSE),
    aes(label=Gene), size=2.2, max.overlaps=12, show.legend=FALSE, colour="black"
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name="Mean PAI3D\nchar score", option="inferno") +
  scale_size_continuous(name="Mean PAI3D\nchar score", range=c(0.5, 6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=chr_label_positions$mid_x, labels=chr_label_positions$chr_label,
                     expand=expansion(mult=0.01)) +
  guides(colour=guide_legend(), size=guide_legend()) +
  labs(title    = "Gene CAAS Score + PrimateAI-3D — Manhattan View",
      subtitle = "Bubble size and colour: mean PAI3D characterisation score | y = -log10(1 - gene_caas_score)",
       x = "Chromosome", y = "-log10(1 - gene_caas_score)") +
  theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold"), axis.text.x=element_text(size=7),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())
```

### CAAS Window Accumulation (Positions)

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates not available — position window accumulation skipped."`

```{r pos-window-accum, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
# Tile position-level CAAS scores into genomic windows.
# pos_genomic is built in the pos-caas-manhattan-setup chunk above.
# We use the same pos_chr_offsets to align x-coordinates with the gene-level plots.
win_size_label <- if (params$window_size_bp >= 1e6) {
  sprintf("%g Mb", params$window_size_bp / 1e6)
} else {
  sprintf("%g kb", params$window_size_bp / 1e3)
}

pos_wins <- pos_genomic %>%
  rename(Gene = Gene) %>%
  make_window_accum("CAAS_score", win_size = params$window_size_bp) %>%
  left_join(pos_chr_offsets %>% select(chr_order, offset), by = "chr_order") %>%
  mutate(n_positions = n_genes,
         win_x       = win_mid + offset,
         chr_even    = chr_order %% 2 == 0,
         mean_log    = -log10(1 - pmin(mean_score, 0.9999)),
         max_log     = -log10(1 - pmin(max_score,  0.9999)))

# Label the top windows as genomic regions, not gene names
top_pos_wins <- pos_wins %>%
  slice_max(mean_log, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(region_label = sprintf("chr%s:%0.1f-%0.1f Mb", chr_label, win_start / 1e6, win_end / 1e6))

ggplot(pos_wins, aes(x = win_x, y = mean_log, fill = chr_even)) +
  geom_col(width = params$window_size_bp * 0.9, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(y = max_log, colour = chr_even), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_pos_wins,
    aes(y = max_log, label = sprintf("%s\n(%d positions)", region_label, n_positions)),
    size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 10, colour = "black",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[3], "TRUE" = .tableau10[4]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = pos_chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = pos_chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = sprintf("Position-Level CAAS Score — %s Window Accumulation", win_size_label),
    subtitle = sprintf("Bars = mean | Points = max | %d windows across %d chromosomes",
                       nrow(pos_wins), length(unique(pos_wins$chr_order))),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "-log10(1 - mean CAAS score)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r pos-window-accum-table, eval=has_genomic && exists("pos_wins") && nrow(pos_wins) > 0}
DT::datatable(
  pos_wins %>%
    select(chr_label, win_start, win_end, n_positions, mean_score, max_score, mean_log) %>%
    mutate(
      win_start  = format(win_start, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
      win_end    = format(win_end,   big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
      mean_score = round(mean_score, 4),
      max_score  = round(max_score,  4),
      mean_log   = round(mean_log,   4)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_log)) %>%
    rename(chr = chr_label, start = win_start, end = win_end,
           n_pos = n_positions, mean_CAAS = mean_score, max_CAAS = max_score,
           `-log10(1-mean)` = mean_log),
  rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    sprintf("Top genomic windows by position-level CAAS accumulation (%s windows)", win_size_label)
  )
)
```

### CAAS Window Accumulation (Genes)

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates not available — gene-level CAAS window accumulation skipped."`

```{r gene-caas-window-accum, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
gene_caas_wins <- gene_genomic %>%
  make_window_accum("gene_caas_score", win_size = params$window_size_bp) %>%
  stitch_windows() %>%
  mutate(mean_log = -log10(1 - pmin(mean_score, 0.9999)),
         max_log  = -log10(1 - pmin(max_score,  0.9999)))

top_caas_wins <- gene_caas_wins %>%
  slice_max(mean_log, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(region_label = sprintf("chr%s:%0.1f-%0.1f Mb", chr_label, win_start / 1e6, win_end / 1e6))

ggplot(gene_caas_wins, aes(x = win_x, y = mean_log, fill = chr_even)) +
  geom_col(width = params$window_size_bp * 0.9, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(y = max_log, colour = chr_even), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_caas_wins,
    aes(y = max_log, label = sprintf("%s\n(%d genes)", region_label, n_genes)),
    size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 10, colour = "black",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[3], "TRUE" = .tableau10[4]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = sprintf("Gene CAAS Score — %s Window Accumulation", win_size_label),
    subtitle = sprintf("Bars = mean | Points = max | %d windows", nrow(gene_caas_wins)),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "-log10(1 - mean gene_caas_score)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r gene-caas-window-accum-table, eval=has_genomic && exists("gene_caas_wins") && nrow(gene_caas_wins) > 0}
DT::datatable(
  gene_caas_wins %>%
    select(chr_label, win_start, win_end, n_genes, mean_score, max_score, mean_log) %>%
    mutate(
      win_start  = format(win_start, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
      win_end    = format(win_end,   big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
      mean_score = round(mean_score, 4),
      max_score  = round(max_score,  4),
      mean_log   = round(mean_log,   4)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_log)) %>%
    rename(chr = chr_label, start = win_start, end = win_end,
           n_genes = n_genes, mean_CAAS = mean_score, max_CAAS = max_score,
           `-log10(1-mean)` = mean_log),
  rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    sprintf("Top genomic windows by gene CAAS score accumulation (%s windows)", win_size_label)
  )
)
```

### CAAS TOP Window Accumulation (Genes)

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates not available — gene-level CAAS TOP window accumulation skipped."`

```{r gene-caas-top-window-accum, eval=has_genomic && any(!is.na(gene_genomic$gene_caas_top)), fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
gene_top_wins <- gene_genomic %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_caas_top)) %>%
  make_window_accum("gene_caas_top", win_size = params$window_size_bp) %>%
  stitch_windows() %>%
  mutate(mean_log = -log10(1 - pmin(mean_score, 0.9999)),
         max_log  = -log10(1 - pmin(max_score,  0.9999)))

top_top_wins <- gene_top_wins %>%
  slice_max(mean_log, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(region_label = sprintf("chr%s:%0.1f-%0.1f Mb", chr_label, win_start / 1e6, win_end / 1e6))

ggplot(gene_top_wins, aes(x = win_x, y = mean_log, fill = chr_even)) +
  geom_col(width = params$window_size_bp * 0.9, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(y = max_log, colour = chr_even), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_top_wins,
    aes(y = max_log, label = sprintf("%s\n(%d genes)", region_label, n_genes)),
    size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 10, colour = "black", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE"=.tableau10[1], "TRUE"=.tableau10[2]), guide="none") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("FALSE"=.tableau10[3], "TRUE"=.tableau10[4]), guide="none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=chr_label_positions$mid_x, labels=chr_label_positions$chr_label,
                     expand=expansion(mult=0.01)) +
  labs(title    = sprintf("Gene CAAS Score TOP — %s Window Accumulation", win_size_label),
       subtitle = sprintf("Bars = mean | Points = max | %d windows", nrow(gene_top_wins)),
       x = "Chromosome", y = "-log10(1 - mean gene_caas_top)") +
  theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold"), axis.text.x=element_text(size=7),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())
```

```{r gene-caas-top-window-accum-table, eval=has_genomic && exists("gene_top_wins") && nrow(gene_top_wins) > 0}
DT::datatable(
  gene_top_wins %>%
    select(chr_label, win_start, win_end, n_genes, mean_score, max_score, mean_log) %>%
    mutate(
      win_start  = format(win_start, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
      win_end    = format(win_end,   big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
      mean_score = round(mean_score, 4),
      max_score  = round(max_score,  4),
      mean_log   = round(mean_log,   4)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_log)) %>%
    rename(chr = chr_label, start = win_start, end = win_end,
           n_genes = n_genes, mean_CAAS_top = mean_score, max_CAAS_top = max_score,
           `-log10(1-mean)` = mean_log),
  rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    sprintf("Top genomic windows by directional TOP gene CAAS accumulation (%s windows)", win_size_label)
  )
)
```

```{r genomic-window-tsv-export, eval=has_genomic}
if (exists("pos_wins") && nrow(pos_wins) > 0) {
  readr::write_tsv(
    pos_wins %>% select(-chr_even, -mean_log, -max_log),
    file.path(params$output_dir, "genomic_window_accum_positions.tsv"))
}
if (exists("gene_caas_wins") && nrow(gene_caas_wins) > 0) {
  readr::write_tsv(
    gene_caas_wins %>% select(-chr_even, -mean_log, -max_log),
    file.path(params$output_dir, "genomic_window_accum_gene_caas.tsv"))
}
if (exists("gene_top_wins") && nrow(gene_top_wins) > 0) {
  readr::write_tsv(
    gene_top_wins %>% select(-chr_even, -mean_log, -max_log),
    file.path(params$output_dir, "genomic_window_accum_gene_caas_top.tsv"))
}
cat("Exported genomic window accumulation TSVs\n")
```

---

## Supplementary Exports

```{r supplementary-tsv-export}
# Build a wide supplementary table joining position_scores with FADE and PAI data.
# Exported as position_scores_annotated.tsv alongside the report outputs.

supp_df <- pos_df

# Join FADE data: use the direction-matched FADE table for each position
if (has_fade_pos) {
  fade_combined <- bind_rows(
    if (!is.null(fade_top_df)) fade_top_df %>% mutate(fade_direction = "TOP")    else NULL,
    if (!is.null(fade_bot_df)) fade_bot_df %>% mutate(fade_direction = "BOTTOM") else NULL
  )
  if (nrow(fade_combined) > 0) {
    # For positions in both directions (change_side == "both"), take TOP FADE by priority
    fade_for_join <- fade_combined %>%
      mutate(fade_direction_priority = if_else(fade_direction == "TOP", 1L, 2L)) %>%
      group_by(Gene, Position) %>%
      slice_min(fade_direction_priority, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(Gene, Position,
             fade_max_site_bf     = max_site_bf,
             fade_top_target_aa   = top_target_aa,
             fade_biased,
             fade_direction)
    supp_df <- supp_df %>% left_join(fade_for_join, by = c("Gene", "Position"))
  }
}

# Join PAI data
if (has_vep_primateai && exists("pos_vep_pai") && nrow(pos_vep_pai) > 0) {
  pai_for_join <- pos_vep_pai %>%
    select(Gene, Position, pai_char_score, n_pai_schemes)
  supp_df <- supp_df %>% left_join(pai_for_join, by = c("Gene", "Position"))
}

readr::write_tsv(supp_df,
  file.path(params$output_dir, "position_scores_annotated.tsv"))

cat(sprintf("Exported position_scores_annotated.tsv: %d rows, %d columns\n",
            nrow(supp_df), ncol(supp_df)))
cat(sprintf("Columns: %s\n", paste(names(supp_df), collapse = ", ")))
```

---

## Summary

```{r summary-stats}
n_components <- 4L  # biochem, asr, convergence, parallel

n_gene_components <- 1L  # gene_caas always present
if (has_accum_score) n_gene_components <- n_gene_components + 1L
if (has_rer)         n_gene_components <- n_gene_components + 1L

summary_tbl <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Positions scored", "Genes scored",
    "Position-level components", "Gene-level components",
    "CAAS Score (median)", "CAAS Score (top 10% threshold)",
    "Gene CAAS TOP (median)", "Gene CAAS TOP (top 10% threshold)",
    "FADE site-level analysis available",
    "Accumulation score available", "RERConverge available",
    "VEP PrimateAI-3D available",
    "Genomic coordinates available"
  ),
  Value = c(
    format(nrow(pos_df), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(gene_df), big.mark = ","),
    as.character(n_components),
    as.character(n_gene_components),
    sprintf("%.4f", median(pos_df$CAAS_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sprintf("%.4f", thr_10),
    sprintf("%.4f", median(gene_df$gene_caas_top, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sprintf("%.4f", g_top_thr_10),
    ifelse(has_fade_pos,     "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_accum_score,  "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_rer,          "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_vep_primateai,"Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_genomic,      "Yes", "No")
  )
)

knitr::kable(summary_tbl, align = c("l", "r"))
```

---

<details>
<summary>Session Info</summary>
```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
</details>
